items.title: Defense Electronics Market to Hit Valuation of US$ 257.19 Billion By 2033 | Astute Analytica
items.author: N/A
items.description: The global defense electronics market is rapidly evolving, driven by technological advancements and rising geopolitical tensions. Key trends include the adoption of unmanned systems, advanced network-centric warfare, and the integration of artificial intelligence. The market is expected to grow at a CAGR of 6.07% from 2025 to 2033, reaching $257.19 billion by 2033.
